prompt: A full-body outdoor shot captures a {argument name="subject" default="young Caucasian woman, possibly in her late 20s"}, striding through a {argument name="location" default="city crosswalk"}. She wears an {argument name="jacket" default="oversized, matte chocolate-brown leather jacket"} paired with a free-flowing black skirt and sleek knee-high black boots, conveying a sense of high fashion street style. Her long, dark brown hair is wind-swept, complementing her poised and confident expression as she glances sideways. Behind her, a blurred urban backdrop features a yellow taxi and pedestrians, with buildings displaying varied architectural details in neutral tones. The scene utilizes soft ambient daylight filtering through light cloud cover, producing a muted, overcast lighting effect. The warm, earthy color palette consists of brown, black, and touches of beige. The image, likely from a high-resolution digital camera, presents a wide-angle view that maintains focus throughout, emphasizing a dynamic and fashionable feel.
translatedPrompt: 一张户外全身照，捕捉了一位 {argument name="subject" default="年轻白人女性，大约 20 多岁末期"} 走在 {argument name="location" default="城市人行横道"} 上的画面。她身穿一件 {argument name="jacket" default="超大款哑光巧克力棕色皮夹克"}，搭配飘逸的黑色长裙和时髦的黑色过膝长靴，展现出高级的街头时尚感。她深棕色的长发随风飘动，侧目而视的表情从容自信。背景中，模糊的城市景象里隐约可见黄色出租车和行人，建筑物的建筑细节呈现出中性色调。场景利用穿过薄云的柔和环境日光，营造出柔和的阴天光影效果。整体色调为温暖的大地色系，包含棕色、黑色和少许米色。这张照片看起来由高分辨率数码相机拍摄，采用广角视角，在保持整体清晰度的同时，突显出动态与时尚感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 城市街头时尚摄影：一个街头时尚摄影提示词，用于拍摄具有柔和环境光和浅景深的动态城市照片。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: overcast, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
